!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!

Blueprint Report #4
Simple Front-End Funnel That Works!
!
Reminder: These Blueprint Reports alternate every other
month with issues of the Marketing Funnels Uncensored Letter -
6 times a year a new Blueprint Report, 6 times a year a new
issue of the Letter.
!

-- 1 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
This month we’re going to take an in-depth look at a simple, yet wildly effective
front-end customer acquisition funnel. It just so happens to be one of my
funnels. Which makes this month’s Blueprint unique and special.
!
Because now, in addition to pointing-out all of the little psychological nuances at
play, I can also share with you the specific strategic reasons behind certain
aspects of the funnel (i.e. word choice, upsell order, message delivery format,
etc.).
!
The funnel we’re about to cover is one of our current front-end customer
acquisition funnels at MarketingFunnelAutomation.com. It’s used primarily to
convert cold traffic coming from Facebook Advertising and Solo Email ads.
!
Weekly it fluctuates between generating new customers at slightly under break-
even to generating new customers at a slight profit. Overall, on a monthly basis, it
has consistently allowed us to “acquire new customers for free” going on about 5
months or so now.
! Sidenote: Over the next 3 months we’ll be getting more and more aggressive
with the investment we make to acquire customers through this funnel.
Meaning: We’ll be going more and more negative on the front in the acquisition
of a new customer and tracking how long it takes us to get to break-even with a
second/third transaction.
!
As I talked about in last month’s MFU Letter, the more aggressive your cash
flow allows you to be with what you can invest to acquire new customers, the
faster you will grow your business. Period.
!
What I really want you to grasp with this funnel, first and foremost, is its
simplicity.
!
You’ll notice the whole funnel is comprised of just 6 fairly basic web pages, with
only one VSL (video sales letter) used throughout the entire funnel.
!
This is possible because of the low-price, high-value offer being made with the
main front-end product. And, because of the strategic price-structure (which I’ll
cover for you) of the upsell sequence.
!
There’s a lot of gold to be gleaned from this funnel. And the pages of this
Blueprint.
!
So, what do you say we get down to business and jump right into the entry point
of the funnel…
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 2 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Step #1: Squeeze Page
Now, as absurd as this may sound…
!
This is the current control squeeze page for this funnel.
!
We’ve tested it out the whazoo against virtually every other kind of squeeze page
you can think of. And, we have yet to be able to beat it (in terms of sheer opt-in
rate).
!
Ironically, this simple, ultra-stripped-down type of squeeze page is very similar to
one of the longest-standing squeeze page controls we had in one of the early
companies I founded about 10 years ago.
!
Just like with this control, we tested that one against everything we could think
of. And nothing was able to beat it for years.
!
Here’s what that page looked like:
!
!
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 3 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
This old squeeze page (directly above) was created as a stand-alone HTML page.
The new one was created with LeadPages and is hosted on our
MarketingFunnelAutomation.com domain and server.
!
When launching a new funnel, this is the format and type of squeeze page we
always begin our testing with. It allows us to quickly test the main premise
behind the promise of the squeeze page with as little “noise” as possible. I highly
advise you to do the same.
!
Now, there are a couple of key psychological triggers at play in the headline of
this squeeze page I want you to notice and be aware of when creating your own
version.
!
First, look at the pre-head…
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 4 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
It immediately conveys who the page is for by saying who it’s NOT for. Keep in
mind, I could have very easily just said, “For Advanced Marketers Only”. But, I I
chose to use a “negative exclusion” pre-head intentionally for two reasons:
!
1. 	By stating the pre-head as a negative (i.e. who it’s not for) it creates a subtle
takeaway. And in the process, makes what’s shared on the next page seem
more exclusive and private. Remember, people are more apt to want things
that are being pulled away from them. In this case, it makes advanced
marketers feel the content is more for them, and makes the newer, novice
marketers want it even more.
!
2. 	It allows me to use repetition (i.e. that this is advanced material) without
being repetitive (saying the same thing). I already say in the main headline
that the content is “advanced”. So by stating the pre-head in a negative, I am
able to convey the same thing, but said differently. Remember, repetition in
your marketing message is key. Just be sure you’re conveying the same
message without saying the same exact thing over and over.
!
Next, look at the main headline…
!
It starts off with a number… conveying a specific number of tactics shared after
the prospect opts-in. And it continues by promising to give prospects something
that is a hot topic right now (marketing funnel conversion tactics).
!
I specifically chose to refer to them as “marketing funnel conversion tactics”
because the phrase “marketing funnel”, not “sales funnel” is part of my brand and
a big part of my positioning in the marketplace.
!
As well, the specific phrase “marketing funnel conversion tactics” is not currently
being promised by anyone else in the marketplace. So, it allows for immediate
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 5 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
differentiation. And, it allows me promise something that has the appearance of
unique.
!
The phrase “used by A-Player marketers” furthers the exclusivity of the content.
And creates an additional level of curiosity. Again, this exact phrase was chosen
strategically. And is used to fulfill the voyeuristic desire of most prospects (in the
online marketing arena) which is to see what the elite are doing, that they are
probably not, to create successful marketing funnels.
!
Next, notice the words “right now” when talking about the “26 advanced
marketing funnel conversion tactics used by A-player marketers”.
!
As I talked about in a prior Blueprint, it’s critical when you’re talking about
benefits or case studies or tactics that you talk about them in the present-tense.
Meaning: you must talk about what benefits are being reaped now, what’s
working now, what’s being done now. Not what’s worked in the past.
!
Anytime you present benefits, tactics, case studies, etc., in the past-tense (i.e.
what worked over the years, over the last year, etc.), you open yourself up to allow
prospects to doubt their effectiveness today. As well, prospects want to know
what’s new, not what’s old… even if the old is proven and effective. Right, wrong,
or indifferent, this is the way prospects think. And you need to recognize and
accept it when writing your headlines, copy, message, and so on.
!
Lastly, you’ll notice that this squeeze page simply asks for email address, and not
first name and email address.
!
I believe, today, in most niches, the added benefit of being able use the prospect’s
first name in your email messaging is negligible.
!
Years ago, before the average prospect knew there were email autoresponders,
personalizing your messaging with their first name was an effective way of
making our communications seem more personal.
!
Today, most prospects know our email campaigns are being delivered by
technology. So, even with their first name in the greeting, most know it’s not
really a personal message.
!
If, when testing your squeeze pages, you find that asking for first name and email
address doesn’t suppress opt-in rate, go for it. But, I’ve found, in most tests,
asking just for email address does in fact bump opt-in rate. I believe you’ll find
the same.
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 6 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Step #2: VSL (Video Sales Letter)
Now, before I share some of the essential elements of this VSL, I want you to be
aware of something BIG going on here. No doubt this will be controversial for
some readers. Average marketers will probably cry blasphemy and heresy. So be
it. You need to be aware of this.
!
When you look at the squeeze page and destination/thank you page after opt-in,
you’ll notice there is no typical “lead magnet” being offered in the way of an extra,
separate piece of content, tool, video, etc. The “lead magnet” offered on the
squeeze page is simply the VSL. In other words, the actual marketing piece/sales
vehicle itself is the lead magnet.
!
This is something I feel most novice marketers don’t understand, and therefore,
get wrong in their front-end marketing funnels.
!
When offering a low-priced front-end product, I do not feel (based on extensive
testing data) there is any need to create an extra piece of content that doesn’t
drive the sale and simply serves as a way of getting the opt-in. When done
correctly, your VSL or sales letter should itself deliver value and function
simultaneously as the lead magnet and marketing piece/sales vehicle.
!
The entire approach of using a squeeze page before delivering your “sales
message” - known as two-step marketing - has it’s origins in the offline direct
response world. And, the whole idea and purpose of two-step marketing, as it was
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 7 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
originally designed to do, was to use step one to get interested prospects to
identify themselves, so in step two you can invest your marketing resources and
efforts in marketing and selling to qualified prospects.
!
A common two-step marketing approach used back in the day in the offline
world, was to have an advertisement or direct mail piece that drove prospects to a
toll-free recorded message where they could leave their name and address for
more information.
!
Then, the information that was promised and requested would be delivered,
would do the marketing, would make the offer, and would generate the sale.
!
Never was there any piece of “extra” information delivered that wasn’t part of the
marketing and sales-generation process. The first piece of information, and every
piece of information thereafter, was always designed from beginning to end to
make the sale.
!
Now, of course, back in the day (as still exists today with direct mail) there are
additional costs that aren’t found with simply using webpages and email.
However, the point is that the two-step process of marketing never involved any
kind of extra, non-sales-driven content piece for the sheer sake of getting
someone to raise their hand.
!
Every piece of content/information that was and is delivered to prospects after
they raise their hand (i.e. call a toll-free recorded message or enter their email
address into an opt-in form) should be designed to further the sale and make an
offer.
!
Again, when you’re marketing materials are done correctly (using something I’ve
coined as Education-Based Marketing Content) there is no need for any kind of
extra lead magnet. Your EBM materials should serve as the lead magnet.
!
Make sense?
!
Good.
!
Then let’s continue…
!
You’ll notice there is no header image or headline above the video. We tested
multiple variations of this page with header only, headline only, header and
headline, and just the video… and the winner was just the video.
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 8 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
I can speculate why this was the case. But, the reality is, it doesn’t matter why. It
only matters what the results were.
! Sidenote: Recently at a mastermind meeting down here in Boca Raton, Florida, I spent
some time chatting with one of the chief copywriters, KM, who helped my friend Mark
Ford (Michael Masterson) launch his wildly successful Palm Beach Letter. KM shared a
story about his time spent as a copywriter at Stansberry Research (the most successful
division of Agora) that reiterates the above point. He said Porter Stansberry used to say
to them, as it relates to their testing results and data, “We’re in the WHAT business. Not
the WHY business. We don’t need to know why certain things work. We just need to
find out what works and use those things.”
!
As well, note that the VSL has a delayed call to action (CTA) area. Again, we
tested a delayed CTA versus a displayed CTA, and with this offer, the delayed CTA
was the clear winner. You can see a screenshot of the current CTA area below:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 9 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
The CTA area appears right when the offer is presented in the VSL. The timing of
when this area appears is something we’ve been testing. But, thus far, at the time
of the offer remains as the control.
!
Take notice of the placement of testimonials in the CTA area.
!
The first thing prospects see when the CTA area appears are the first two
testimonials. And, after they scan the section, the last thing they see are two more
(Facebook) testimonials.
!
This was done, of course, strategically.
!
People are more apt to remember things that are placed at the beginning or end
of a block of information or list.
!
This is why, when constructing your bullet lists for long-form sales letters, you
want your more powerful bullets either at the beginning or the end, not in the
middle.
! *EXTRA GOODIE: I’ve attached a copy of the entire unedited script for
this VSL for your review.
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 10 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Step #3: Order Form
!
The original order form we tested for this order was fairly simple and straight-
forward:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 11 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
We then tested the original order form against a variation similar to what is used
at Digital Marketer:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 12 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
The DM version out-pulled the original version.
!
Nothing at all revolutionary here, but I can speculate that the addition of the
guarantee seal right at the top of the order form, as well as the product summary
and product specific testimonials boosted engagement and decreased
abandonment rate.
!
The next variation we are planning on testing is a version of our typical “old-
school” order form. You can see an example below:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 13 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Step #4: Upsell #1
!
Now here is where things get a bit interesting in this funnel. Let’s start by taking a
look at the top of the page for this upsell.
The first thing I want you to notice is how the progress bar has expanded to now
include a new section - “Product Options”.
!
If you scroll up and look at the progress bar on the order form screenshot, you
will not see this section in there.
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 14 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
I first heard Ryan Deiss mention this, and I fully agree that including “Product
Options” on the progress bar of the order form can potentially scare prospects by
revealing that they’ll be getting additional purchasing options right after their
main order.
!
Next, you’ll see that we included “Step #2” bigger, bolded, and right at the start of
the pre-head. This is to convey the idea of continuance from the prior order
form. As well, along with “Your order for 26 Advanced Marketing Funnel
Conversion Tactics is almost complete” keeps the prospect from thinking their
ordering process is over.
!
Remember, when it comes to moving prospects from their main initial purchase
into an upsell/downsell sequence, you do NOT want to give them the sense of
completion.
!
You want them to feel as if the ordering process is still in progress and they are
not done yet. This is why, we never use language like, “Thank you for completing
your order” until the very end of the upsell/downsell sequence.
!
Moving on to the headline… notice how we used the word “Advanced” again to
convey congruence and more of the same.
!
Remember, the original offer was for 26 Advanced Marketing Funnel Conversion
Tactics and now the upsell is for a bootcamp recording that reveals Advanced
Sales Creation Secrets. Similar in theme, concept, and general appeal.
!
Next, I want you to look at the image used right below the headline. This screen
shot from the bootcamp was used strategically.
!
I know, from our advertising metrics, that right now our prospects respond to ads
that have some sort of flow chart, mind map, funnel diagram, etc.
!
So, I chose to use an image of me pointing at a portion of the funnel diagram I
was talking about during the bootcamp.
!
Next, look at the area and blurb right underneath the image:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 15 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
It clearly and concisely lets prospects know this is a real one-time offer.
! Sidenote: Any time you’re going to present an offer as a “one-time offer”… for
goodness sake, make sure it’s really an offer only presented once. In this case, we
cookie the visitor so if they attempt to return to the page after the first visit, they
will not be able to.
!
And, to add another level of urgency, right under this section there is a
countdown timer that ticks down for 10-minutes before the offer expires. Once
the countdown timer hits zero, it cookies prospects and automatically redirects
them to the next page in the offer sequence.
!
Underneath this section, you’ll find a list of bullets sharing some of what
prospects will hear and discover in the bootcamp. These are well worth you
reviewing:
!
This thing is JAM-PACKED! And intense.
In fact, take a peek at just some of what you’ll hear and see in this rare training:
• The 3 things prospects must believe if they are ever going to buy (miss any one of
these in your marketing funnel and conversions will be minuscule)!
• What never to offer on your squeeze page if you don’t want to attract poor quality
leads.
• When you should NOT use a big promise and big benefit headline on your squeeze
page.
• The critical difference between an Offer Funnel and Marketing Funnel… and when
and where to use each.
• 7 things you need to know about prospects before you begin creating your marketing
funnel. Not knowing even just one of these can be the cause of a tiny response rate.
• AVOID THIS! The common marketing tactic that repeatedly leads to a highly
UNRESPONSIVE list within as little as 40 days!
• What you need to know about the life span of every marketing funnel so your business
continues to generate new leads and customers long-term.
• The marketer with the highest _________ will win the game in every niche. And how
to make sure YOU have it.
• The Secret Mantra, shared with my private clients, that drives everything we do when
creating funnels to ensure maximum return on investment.
• 2 key elements of every killer Lead Magnet. Incorporate these 2 on your squeeze
page and watch your opt-in rate soar!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 16 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
• 8 examples of Big Marketing Ideas that each generated millions of dollars and tens of
thousands of new customers!
• The real-deal TRUTH about the approach to marketing that causes many popular
“gurus” to burn through cash and run out of money… forcing them to constantly have
to do new product launches! (AVOID this like the plague if you don’t want to suffer the
same fate)!
• The Big Backend Lie: Sadly, it’s regularly taught to unsuspecting marketers, and it will
kill the long-term viability of your business. (It’s why many marketers experience
shrinking lead flow and income over time).
• What you must know about the 5 Prospect Awareness Levels to ensure your
marketing message truly resonates with your audience. (This, alone, can immediately
double, triple, and even quadruple your conversion rate and sales numbers).
• How to maximize the dollar value of every lead so you can easily afford to invest in
any traffic channel… no matter how “expensive” they seem right now.
• How to eliminate the constant need for affiliates and joint ventures to grow your
business… by using the only scalable method of lead flow.
• 5 Stages of Market Sophistication and what they tell you about your prospects so your
marketing message positions your offer as the perfect solution
• The big ERROR in the common approach to using joint ventures in your business
• 7 components of a Big Marketing Idea that cuts through the clutter and ensures your
marketing stands-out in even the most crowded marketplace!
• The WRONG way to use product launches in your business… if you don’t want to
slaughter the value of your list.
• The one piece of advice I got from Rich Schefren years ago, during a private meeting
at a Starbucks cafe, that continues to bring me a consistent flow of new customers
every day (Anyone can follow it and experience the same outcome)!
• EXAMPLES: 3 banners that get massive clicks because of how they convey an
immediate unique marketing idea
• The only reliable and consistent form of traffic for any business. (If you’re reliant on
any other type of traffic your business and income is vulnerable to shrinkage)!
• DIRECT MAIL SAMPLE: How I transformed an ordinary mastermind offer into a
completely unique experience… using the power of the “yet-to-happen story”
• How to design your squeeze page so it’s perfectly aligned with the mindset your
prospects have when getting there.
• According to the most successful information marketing company on the planet,
there’s one place where you need to focus your time and resources if you want to
create stability and consistency in your business. I detail the whole thing during the
Bootcamp.
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 17 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
• The difference in how the highest-earners in online marketing use certain marketing
funnel tactics from the way average marketers do.
• What I learned from Michael Masterson, the genius behind the $600,000,000 a year
behemoth, Agora, about what staffing roles you need to fill first in your business.
• What segment of your niche’s prospects provide you with the biggest business growth
opportunity… and how to pin-point them in your marketing.
• How to take an average marketing hook and instantly transform it into a captivating
idea that differentiates your marketing from every one elses in your niche
• How to prevent prospects from doubting you, questioning your claims, and thinking,
“Yeah, sure…” when going through your marketing funnel!
• The Secret of the Unique Mechanism: And how it ensures your product stands-out
from everything else being offered to your prospects.
• The only one way to grow your customer base without being vulnerable to SEO
changes, flaky affiliates, and inconsistent JV partners
• The one thing in your marketing that gives your promises and benefits credibility in the
eyes of prospects. (This is critical if you want sales conversion rates above 11%).
• 3 different types of benefits to share for every feature of your product. (Using all three
benefit types is a secret used by the highest earning copywriters on the planet).
• How to eliminate prospect procrastination so they buy right away… rather than later or
never.
• The 4 common components of every high-conversion marketing funnel discovered by
Michael Masterson after reviewing all his million-dollar-plus campaigns.
• How to use curiosity and ___________ to prevent prospects from getting bored by
your marketing!
• The difference between a Big Promise and Big Benefits… and why you need to have
both in your marketing funnel!
• 2 PROOF ELEMENTS you must have in your marketing funnel today to make
prospects believe your claims!
• The 5 Question “Survey” that generates incredible customer testimonials to use in
your marketing (and how to use them strategically at the right time and in the right
place in your marketing funnel)!
• The ONE thing legendary copywriter, Gary Bencivenga, says you must have in your
marketing funnel every time you make a claim about your product.
• How we used the power of a DRAMATIC DEMONSTRATION to sell over $40,000.00
of a brand new product on one live stream… and how you can do the same with any
product!
• How many marketers kill their conversions by accidentally and unknowingly providing
NEGATIVE SOCIAL PROOF (and how you can avoid making this novice blunder)!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 18 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
• The 2 most important client testimonials you must have in your marketing funnel to
excite prospects about the results they’ll get when they buy from you.
• The right way to demonstrate the value of your product to overcome the deadly price
objection… so you can charge and get virtually any price you want!
• 3 Pro Tricks that instantly engineer credibility and authority with prospects… even if
you think you have none… so they trust everything you say!
• How to overcome specific prospect fears with a certain type of customer testimonial.
• The right way to use a DAMAGING ADMISSION in your marketing to instantly make
your marketing believable (If you leave this out, prospects will doubt most of what you
say. If you do this wrong you will kill your conversions. Do it the way I show you and
your conversions will immediately skyrocket)!
• Gary Halbert’s little-known trick for getting massive, instant credibility!
• SUBLIMINAL AUTHORITY: The 3-word statement to use in your marketing funnel
that instantly positions you as credible in the eyes of prospects.
• N.P.T.S.M.: The secret “health club formula” that eliminates all possible objections
prospects can have to buying your product or service.
• The single best marketing book ever published… that every marketer needs to read at
least once a year (Jay Abraham and Clayton Makepeace both do this and both
recommend you do as well)!
!
Then, underneath the bullets is a simple call-to-action area with 1-click purchase
option:
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 19 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Two uncommon things I want you to take notice of with this upsell:
!
1. 	There is no VSL or “true” long-form sales letter used.
2. 	The price of the upsell is almost the same as the cost for the initial product,
not the typical 3x pricing.
! Note: I’ve spoken about my views on the pricing of your first upsell in the Reverse
Upsell Report, as well as prior MFU Letters. So, I’ll leave that to you to seek out
and read.
!
The lesson: don’t always accept common practice as gospel.
!
This upsell offer breaks lots of “rules”. Yet, it converts higher than any other
upsell offer I’ve ever tested or used in the years I’ve been online. It averages over
60% conversion. And has for several months now.
!
Leave convention and norms to the novice and non-thinkers.
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 20 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
Step #4: Upsell #2
!
This upsell was actually added after a few months of the funnel going live. Which
itself should be a little lesson to you - you don’t have to have every funnel fully
prepared before going live.
!
In fact, more often than not, we always launch new funnels for testing without
any upsell/downsell sequence or email follow-up. I refer to this type of funnel as
a Minimum Viable Funnel (MVF).
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 21 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
The objective with an MVF is to quickly get some base-level metrics back from
some initial traffic to see if the main offer resonates with the market. If we get a
sense from the metrics it does, then we will build-out/add the upsell/downsell
sequence as as well as more extensive email follow-up.
!
Notice with this upsell offer, the use of the word “Advanced”, again, in the pre-
headline as well as the main headline… continuing with the theme from the
original product offering and prior upsell.
!
The page goes on to quickly explain what the Intensification Process is and the
benefit of using it.
!
Then, gives a quick recap of the offer and call to action:
The one thing I want you to make note of is the offer.
!
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 22 of 28 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #4
By presenting it as two payments of $37 instead of just one payment of $74 it
allows us to keep prospects in the same pricing zone as what they paid for the
initial product (and upsell #1).
! Sidenote: We are finding more and more that prospects will happily pay a higher
total - in some cases significantly higher - if they can pay via payments. So, for
instance, we are finding that a three-payment option of $87 will often out-pull a
single pay of $199… even though the three pay option is actually 30% higher in
price.
!
Pretty simple.
!
Pretty straight-forward.
!
What we’ll be testing next with this little funnel are a couple of Second Chance
offers for customers who don’t take the upsell offers.
!
So, for example, a couple days after someone takes the initial offer, but skips the
first upsell, they’ll get an email giving them some sort of limited time frame to
grab the offer. Same with upsell #2.
!
As well, we’ll be testing adding a third upsell on this sequence. Despite how lots
of people feel about upsells and downsells,… typically… the more you have in
your front-end funnels, the higher your average transaction value climbs.
!
***
!
That’s all for this month.
!
Next month we’ll be back with another issue of the Marketing Funnels
Uncensored Letter.
!
For future issues, if there is a type of funnel you’d like to see dissected or a
particular topic you’d like to see me cover and rip apart, definitely let me know.
!
I’m grateful to report that I’ve been getting some stellar reviews and feedback
from some high-level marketers loving MFU.
!
One even went as far to say it’s one of the two most valuable newsletters he waits
for every month (the other being the GKIC Newsletter).
!
I really do believe there’s “gold” in these pages. It’s just up to you to spot it and
profit from it. Til next month…
Copyright 2014 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

26 Advanced Marketing Funnel Conversion Tactics - Video Sales Letter Script
This is not... I repeat... NOT... for the newbie marketer or the online marketer who
doesn’t currently have at least a basic marketing funnel.
!
This... is for the truly advanced marketer who’s ready to jack-up their marketing
funnel conversions with over 26 advanced marketing funnel super-conversion
tactics. I’m talking about tactics used within the slickest marketing funnels that most
average marketers don’t even know about... and certainly nobody is talking about.
!
Hi, my name is Todd Brown. And I’m going to make this very quick and very easy for
you if you’re ready for it.
!
Currently I’m considered the foremost authority on engineering wildly profitable
marketing funnels. Clients routinely pay a $5,000.00 monthly retainer to have me
optimize their marketing funnels and boost conversions for them. While other
clients pay $1,300.00 a month to have me consult with them about their own
marketing funnel steps and conversions over a 30 day period.
!
And some of the most well-known online marketers have gone through my
Marketing Funnel Automation Coaching Program to get help with their own funnels,
including experts like: Charles Kirkland, Justin Brooke, David Frey, Keith Baxter,
and dozens more. And it was just a short time ago I partnered with Rich Schefren to
oversee the engineering and launch of close to 15 new front-end customer
acquisition funnels for Strategic Profits... what is today... over a 10 million dollar a
year business.
!
In fact, take a quick listen to what Rich, the guy who has created more online
millionaires than possibly any other expert, has to say about what you can learn from
me when it comes to implementing your own high-conversion marketing funnel...
!

!
Now I could go on and on sharing the crazy marketing funnel successes I’ve created
for clients... and share testimonial after testimonial with you from clients talking
about doing $40,000 and $50,000 of extra revenue within just two weeks after
using one or two of my methods... but instead... I want to tell you about a brand new
unique training course I’ve created that will help YOU jack-up your conversions at
every step in your own marketing funnel... and skyrocket the number of new
customers and additional profits you get every day.

what it’s all about...

behind and tools that power 26 of the most advanced marketing funnel conversion
tactics... the same tactics that drive the high-conversion rates of the slickest
marketing funnels online.

has been tested and proven either within one of my own companies, or with one of
my consulting clients or coaching students, or within the companies of one of my
high-level marketing friends. So every thing you’ll hear and see has been proven in
the trenches to drive more prospects through your marketing funnel to buy your
product or service.

at almost every step in the marketing funnel, including advanced tactics that deal
with areas within a marketing funnel like:

volume of work on marketing funnels that I do or has access to the volume of high-

even hear about the high-level stuff being done to double, triple, and even quadruple
conversion rates and new customer acquisition.
